title: last_n drops the most recent entry
body: Calling last_n(entries, 2) returns only 1 entry and it's not the newest. Expected: the last n entries including the most recent one. See test_last_n_returns_newest.

title: total() crashes when an entry has amount=None
body: Pending entries have amount=None until they clear. total() raises TypeError on them — it should skip None amounts. See test_total_skips_none_amounts.

title: average() raises ZeroDivisionError on an empty ledger
body: average([]) should return 0, not crash with ZeroDivisionError. See test_average_empty_ledger_is_zero.

title: find_by_desc is vulnerable to SQL injection
body: The description is interpolated straight into the SQL string. A desc like "x' OR '1'='1" dumps the whole table. Use parameterized queries. See test_find_by_desc_is_injection_safe.
